name: Star Trek
description: Gene Roddenberry's long-running sci-fi universe — Kirk, Spock, Picard, the Enterprise, and beyond.

questions.q: Who is the captain of the USS Enterprise in the original Star Trek series?

source.notes: Originally played by William Shatner.

questions.q: Who is Captain Kirk's half-Vulcan first officer, known for his logic and pointed ears?

source.notes: Played by Leonard Nimoy.

questions.q: What is the registry number of the original USS Enterprise?

source.notes: 'No bloody A, B, C, or D.'

questions.q: Star Trek's opening monologue says space is the what?

source.notes: 'Space: the final frontier…'

questions.q: Who captains the USS Enterprise-D in Star Trek: The Next Generation?

source.notes: Played by Patrick Stewart.

questions.q: What is the four-word pan-galactic peace greeting given by Vulcans with a split-fingered salute?

source.notes: Nimoy adapted the hand gesture from Jewish Kohanim blessings.

questions.q: Which race of cybernetic beings declares 'Resistance is futile' and assimilates other species?

source.notes: Introduced in Next Generation Season 2.

questions.q: What does Captain Kirk's middle initial 'T.' stand for?

source.notes: First said aloud on screen in 1968.

questions.q: Who created Star Trek, first airing on NBC in 1966?

source.notes: Roddenberry was a former LAPD officer and WWII pilot.

questions.q: The TNG character Data is what type of being?

source.notes: Played by Brent Spiner; built by Dr. Noonien Soong.

questions.q: Worf is a character from which warrior-culture race?

source.notes: First Klingon regular on a Star Trek series.

questions.q: Deep Space Nine is set aboard a space station in orbit of which planet?
Who captains USS Voyager in the 1995-2001 series?

source.notes: Played by Kate Mulgrew; first female Trek lead captain.

questions.q: Which starship captain leads Star Trek: Enterprise (2001-2005), set before Kirk's era?

source.notes: Scott Bakula as Archer of the NX-01 Enterprise.

questions.q: Which character repeatedly tests the Enterprise crew as a near-omnipotent alien in TNG?

source.notes: Played by John de Lancie.

questions.q: Which iconic original-series character is Enterprise's chief engineer, played by James Doohan?

source.notes: Montgomery 'Scotty' Scott.

questions.q: Which original-series character is the ship's communications officer?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: replaced duplicate 'Janice Rand' (same character as Yeoman Rand) with 'Number One'. Nichelle Nichols — a groundbreaking role for Black women on TV.

questions.q: What is the name of the Enterprise's faster-than-light propulsion system?

source.notes: Powered by a matter/antimatter reaction moderated by dilithium crystals.

questions.q: Which actor plays Spock in the original series?

source.notes: Nimoy directed Star Treks III and IV.

questions.q: Who directed 2009's J.J. Abrams reboot-film Star Trek, featuring Chris Pine as Kirk?

source.notes: Abrams returned for Into Darkness (2013).

questions.q: Which retired captain does 'Star Trek: Picard' (2020-2023) follow?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: removed misleading sole credit to Beyer (series was co-created by Akiva Goldsman, Michael Chabon, Kirsten Beyer, and Alex Kurtzman). Patrick Stewart reprises the role three decades after TNG.

questions.q: Deep Space Nine's Sisko is commander of a station formerly occupied by which aggressive empire?

source.notes: The Cardassians had occupied Bajor for decades.
